description:
Offered: may be less than once every two years
Students will develop their personal artistic vision at an advanced level in drawing, painting, or sculpture with emphasis on the expressive potential of visual art. Intermediate level experience in at least one medium is required, but students will be encouraged to explore the connection between the different artistic media as well.
Prerequisite(s): ART 2250 or ART 3010 or ART 3020
Note: The course may be repeated once for credit.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, IHIP
